headline: Run Linux Containers Natively on Apple Silicon
lede: Apple’s new container tool bridges the gap between local development and production cloud environments. It utilizes native virtualization to offer high-performance OCI-compatible container management without the overhead of traditional runtimes.

headline: Standardize AI Coding with Production-Grade Skills
lede: This framework maps the software development lifecycle to 23 modular skills designed for modern AI agents. By enforcing disciplined engineering habits, it helps teams reduce technical debt and maintain consistency across complex codebases.

headline: Deploy Medical-Grade NLP Models Locally
lede: OpenMed delivers high-performance clinical natural language processing that operates entirely on local hardware. The framework supports sensitive entity extraction across multiple hardware backends, ensuring patient data privacy is never compromised.

headline: Codify Product Management Workflows for AI Assistants
lede: Transform your AI coding partner into a product manager by importing industry-standard discovery and planning frameworks. This modular skill set guides agents through structured decision-making processes from initial discovery to market growth.

headline: Vet AI Agent Skills for Malicious Patterns
lede: SkillSpector provides a rigorous two-stage analysis to detect vulnerabilities in third-party AI coding skills. By scanning for prompt injection and data exfiltration risks, it secures agentic workflows before deployment into enterprise systems.

headline: Automate Digital Dossier Collection Across Thousands of Sites
lede: Maigret streamlines the digital footprint mapping process by querying thousands of platforms in seconds. It weaves fragmented online data into comprehensive, actionable intelligence for investigators and researchers.

headline: Demystify AI Coding Assistants Through Prompt Archives
lede: This community-driven collection exposes the underlying system prompts and operational directives governing today's leading AI coding agents. It serves as a vital resource for scholars and security researchers aiming to map the internal logic of proprietary models.

headline: Manage Markdown Knowledge Bases with Git-First Design
lede: Tolaria offers a desktop-native interface for complex documentation, prioritizing local storage and version control. Its keyboard-centric design ensures that your second brain remains fully compatible with AI tools and plain-text editors.

headline: Engineering Intelligence Frameworks Scale AI Development
lede: Superpowers transforms AI coding assistants into goal-oriented developers by enforcing a strict test-driven development cycle. It ensures that every generated code block passes through mandatory self-review and planning stages.

headline: Secure Encrypted Backups with High-Performance Deduplication
lede: Restic provides a raw, performant interface for safeguarding critical data across diverse storage backends. By encrypting locally and deduplicating at the byte level, it ensures maximum data integrity with minimal storage overhead.
